email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support Administrator bij uw organisatie. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte, nauwkeurige teamplayer met affiniteit voor order-to-cash en SAP sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto beheer ik het volledige proces van order tot publicatie voor klantwebsites: van offerteaanvraag en planning tot oplevering en nazorg. Ik werk dagelijks met CRM-achtige systemen, optimaliseer workflows en stem af met interne teams (content, development, sales). Mijn ervaring met data-analyse (Google Analytics, Search Console) en gestructureerd werken komt hier goed van pas.

Daarnaast heb ik via mijn project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met product- en prijsbeheer in de praktijk: ik stel alternatieven voor, beheer kortingen en optimaliseer de klantervaring. Mijn logistieke achtergrond bij Katoen Natie heeft mij geleerd nauwkeurig en stressbestendig te werken in een snelle omgeving.

Ik spreek vloeiend Nederlands (B1, in opleiding) en Engels, en ik ben leergierig naar SAP. Ik zoek een rol met verantwoordelijkheid en variatie, en uw bedrijf biedt precies dat.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring graag in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position at your company. Your call for a customer-oriented, accurate team player with affinity for order-to-cash and SAP fits my profile perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage the full process from order to publication for client websites: from quotation and planning to delivery and aftercare. I work daily with CRM-like systems, optimize workflows, and coordinate with internal teams (content, development, sales). My experience with data analysis (Google Analytics, Search Console) and structured work is a strong asset.

Additionally, through my project mirook.com, I gained practical experience in product and price management: I propose alternatives, manage discounts, and optimize the customer experience. My logistics background at Katoen Natie taught me to work accurately and stress-resiliently in a fast-paced environment.

I speak Dutch (B1, in training) and English fluently, and I am eager to learn SAP. I am looking for a role with responsibility and variety, and your company offers exactly that.

I hope to explain my motivation and experience in a conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Sales Support Administrator bij uw organisatie. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte, nauwkeurige teamplayer met affiniteit voor order-to-cash en SAP sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige traject van order tot publicatie voor klantwebsites. Dit omvat het beheren van offertes, planning, oplevering en nazorg – een proces dat sterk lijkt op het order-to-cash-proces. Ik werk dagelijks met CRM-achtige systemen, optimaliseer workflows en stem af met interne teams zoals content, development en sales. Mijn ervaring met data-analyse (Google Analytics, Search Console) helpt mij om datagedreven beslissingen te nemen en processen te verbeteren.

Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com praktijkervaring opgedaan met product- en prijsbeheer. Ik stel alternatieven voor, beheer kortingen en optimaliseer de klantervaring. Mijn logistieke achtergrond bij Katoen Natie heeft mij geleerd nauwkeurig en stressbestendig te werken in een snelle omgeving, wat essentieel is voor het optimaliseren van container- en truckbeladingen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Nederlands (B1, in opleiding) en Engels, en ik ben leergierig naar SAP. Uw bedrijf biedt een internationale, dynamische werkomgeving met veel verantwoordelijkheid – precies wat ik zoek. Ik ben overtuigd dat ik met mijn probleemoplossende vermogen, nauwkeurigheid en resultaatgerichte mindset een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring graag in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position at your company. Your call for a customer-oriented, accurate team player with affinity for order-to-cash and SAP fits my profile and ambition perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage the full process from order to publication for client websites. This includes managing quotations, planning, delivery, and aftercare – a process very similar to the order-to-cash process. I work daily with CRM-like systems, optimize workflows, and coordinate with internal teams such as content, development, and sales. My experience with data analysis (Google Analytics, Search Console) helps me make data-driven decisions and improve processes.

Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I gained practical experience in product and price management. I propose alternatives, manage discounts, and optimize the customer experience. My logistics background at Katoen Natie taught me to work accurately and stress-resiliently in a fast-paced environment, which is essential for optimizing container and truck loadings.

I speak Dutch (B1, in training) and English fluently, and I am eager to learn SAP. Your company offers an international, dynamic working environment with a lot of responsibility – exactly what I am looking for. I am confident that with my problem-solving skills, accuracy, and results-oriented mindset, I can make a valuable contribution to your team.

I hope to explain my motivation and experience in a personal conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Order-to-cash process management: full-cycle client project management from quotation to delivery and aftercare (Episto)
• Customer-facing coordination: daily stakeholder contact, cross-departmental alignment (content, development, sales)
• Data-driven optimization: analytics (Google Analytics, Search Console) to improve processes and reporting
• Logistics accuracy: high-volume, fast-paced warehouse experience (Katoen Natie)
• Languages: Dutch (B1, actively improving), English (professional), Turkish (native)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Order-to-cash process: full-cycle client project management from quotation to delivery and aftercare
- Customer & stakeholder coordination: daily contact with internal teams (content, development, sales) and external clients
- Data analysis & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Product & price management: proposing alternatives, managing discounts, optimizing customer experience
- Logistics & accuracy: high-volume, fast-paced warehouse experience (Katoen Natie)
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
